description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for Windows using Conda. The workflow triggers on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. It uses a concurrency group to cancel in-progress jobs. The workflow consists of a build job with a matrix strategy for Windows 2019 and compilers cl and clang-cl. The job checks out the repository, sets up caching, installs Miniconda, and builds Pinocchio using CMake and Ninja. A separate check job runs on Ubuntu-latest and verifies the success of the build job.
